Name: EquipParamGenerator
Description: Determines the parameters of generator parts.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Model ID
Fields.Description: The model ID for this item. Also determines the menu preview icon.

Fields.Name: Sort ID
Fields.Description: Determines the order of this part in the menu.

Fields.Name: Energy Capacity
Fields.Description: The energy capacity of this generator.

Fields.Name: Energy Output
Fields.Description: The energy recovery rate. In points per second.

Fields.Name: Energy Consumption
Fields.Description: The consumption rate of energy. In points per second.

Fields.Name: Energy Output Delay
Fields.Description: The delay before energy recovery starts. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Energy Output Delay (when Empty)
Fields.Description: The delay before energy recovery starts (when empty). In seconds.

Fields.Name: Energy Output (when Empty)
Fields.Description: The energy capacity of this generator (when empty).

Fields.Name: Energy Weapon Suitability
Fields.Description: Suitability for energy weapons with this generator.

Fields.Name: Corporation Texture ID
Fields.Description: The corporation texture displayed for this part.

Fields.Name: Sell Value
Fields.Description: Price to sell the item for.

Fields.Name: Sale Value
Fields.Description: Price the item is on sale for.

Fields.Name: Additiona Particles: Direct Hit
Fields.Description: Defense material when receiving a critical hit

Fields.Name: Thruster Particle Color Type
Fields.Description: Determines SFX used by boosters. Coral also affects core expansion SFX.

Fields.Name: Inherited Generator ID
Fields.Description: The inherited data for this part.
